title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out and about with Gold
Ship...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Look at that clear box over there! There are tons
of Umamusume trapped in it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Who would do such a thing?! Hang on, everyone!
Help is on the way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship reassures the plushies behind the glass.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're not the type that would abandon all
these poor Umamusume, are you?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Good! Go in there and show us your stuff! I'm
ready to witness the greatest rescue operation of
the century!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
